summary: Verified POS system fixes for iteration 157: 1) Receipt formatting - delivery_company shows name only (no 'شركة التوصيل:' label), centered; dashed lines use lineWidth=2. 2) Biometric auto-sync persists in MongoDB database via GET/POST /api/biometric/auto-sync endpoints. 3) useAutoSync hook runs at App level, checks backend every 60s. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - auto-sync toggle visible in HR > Biometric Devices.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: receiptBitmap.js line 217-219 - delivery_company shows name only without 'شركة التوصيل:' label, uses drawC for centered text
VERIFIED: receiptBitmap.js dash() function line 79 - lineWidth=2 (not 1)
VERIFIED: receiptBitmap.js dbl() function line 86 - lineWidth=2
VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/biometric/auto-sync returns {enabled: bool, enabled_at, enabled_by}
VERIFIED: Backend POST /api/biometric/auto-sync saves to MongoDB collection 'biometric_auto_sync' with upsert
VERIFIED: App.js imports useAutoSync hook (line 16) and uses AutoSyncRunner component (lines 593-596, 611)
VERIFIED: useAutoSync.js checks backend /biometric/auto-sync every 60 seconds (SYNC_INTERVAL = 60 * 1000)
VERIFIED: BiometricDevices.js loads auto-sync state from backend on mount (lines 77-85) and saves via POST (lines 419-429)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Biometric auto-sync now persists in MongoDB collection 'biometric_auto_sync'. The useAutoSync hook runs at App level (AutoSyncRunner component) and checks backend every 60 seconds. Receipt formatting updated: delivery_company shows name only (centered), dashed lines use lineWidth=2. ZKTeco biometric devices and Local USB Print Agent are MOCKED (localhost:9999).

verified_features.feature: POST /api/biometric/auto-sync with enabled=true saves to database
receiptBitmap.js delivery_company shows name only (no label)
useAutoSync hook checks backend auto-sync status
BiometricDevices.js loads/saves auto-sync state from backend

ui_verification.dashboard: Working - Shows quick actions and statistics
ui_verification.hr_page: Working - Shows employee list with biometric tab
